correction.rationale: No executable correction is justified; the visible target coverage and boundary are acceptable.

judgments.evidence: The candidate is anatomically the character's right foot per COCO semantic chain evidence, and the mask provides continuous coverage of the visible foot with a clean outer silhouette and no substantial neighbor contamination.

observations.contour: The cyan contour is generally aligned with the skin/background boundary. The straight upper ankle cutoff is plausible for the atomic foot-base boundary rather than an attempt to include the lower leg.
observations.full_context: The highlighted target is the character's right foot, consistent with the supplied semantic pose-chain evidence. It is the forward foot and is clearly visible without clothing overlap.
observations.mask: The mask covers the visible foot, ankle region, heel, instep, and toes. It does not extend into the neighboring rear foot or clothing.
observations.neighbor_overlap: No meaningful overlap with the rear foot, lower leg outside the target boundary, clothing, or background objects is evident.
observations.overlay: The red overlay follows the visible foot silhouette closely along the heel, instep, toe tips, and lower edge. No obvious background spill is visible.
observations.source_crop: The crop shows the complete visible foot and lower ankle transition, with a clear silhouette against the gray background. The ankle boundary is partially defined by the crop framing and pose.

correction.rationale: The mask boundary already tightly follows the visible right foot silhouette with correct side assignment per pose-chain evidence; no correction is needed despite unrelated global QA flags concerning other body parts (shoulder/knee/thigh chain integrity).

judgments.evidence: The mask corresponds to the character's right foot (nearest_semantic_chain=right, expected_character_side=right), fully covering the visible dorsal foot and toes with a tight, accurate boundary and no contamination from background, floor, or the other foot.

observations.contour: White contour line tracks the ankle joint notch, lateral foot edge, and toe tips accurately, following the true anatomical boundary of the visible foot.
observations.full_context: Cyan ROI box captures the forward-leaning right foot in the full-body pose; pose-chain evidence confirms this limb belongs to the character's right side (distance_to_chain_px right=263 vs left=788).
observations.mask: Binary mask outlines a foot-shaped silhouette including ankle notch, arch, and five-toe front edge, with no stray blobs or holes.
observations.neighbor_overlap: No visible overlap with the trailing left foot/ankle or any clothing; the crop is isolated to the single right foot region.
observations.overlay: Red overlay aligns closely with the foot's visible skin boundary, covering the dorsal foot and toes without bleeding onto the gray floor or the other leg.
observations.source_crop: High-res crop shows a bare foot from ankle to toe-tips, with visible tendons, toenails, and ground shadow; no clothing or other limb overlaps this region.
